meta.description: Single-file HTML/JS/CSS music songwriting app. Firebase Auth + Firestore backend.

html_and_css.description: HTML markup + CSS styles (~40k lines of CSS, 857 DOM IDs, 3563 unique CSS selectors)

additional_scripts.description: Additional script blocks for Timeline engine, Piano Roll engine, Quick Chords, etc.

Sequencer.description: Step sequencer for drums and chords. Independent grid resolutions (drumSteps/chordSteps). Scheduler runs at drum resolution, chords map via Math.floor(drumStep * chordSteps / drumSteps).

4-Track Recorder.description: 4-track multitrack recorder with takes, comping, and waveform UI. ft- prefix for UI layer, shares scope with _mt* (audio engine) and _vr* (voice recorder). RAF loop: ftTickStart() → ftTick().

Multitrack Audio Engine.description: Core audio engine for multitrack recording and playback. Manages AudioContext, gain nodes, recording streams, and audio routing.

Voice Recorder.description: Voice/audio recording system. Manages mic input, noise gate (AudioWorklet), take management, and trash system (auto-purge ~6 days).

Loop Station.description: 4-track loop recorder. Each track has color coding. Stores loops in Firestore song_loops collection.

Mixer.description: Mixing desk with per-channel faders, pan, mute/solo, EQ, and compression. Includes debug panel (Shift+D) and signal chain visualizer (Shift+V).

Piano / Keyboard.description: Piano sampler using AudioBuffer playback. Supports multiple layouts: floating overlay, mobile landscape/portrait, desktop two-column. MIDI input supported.

MIDI.description: Web MIDI API integration. Input device selection, channel routing, note on/off handling.

Chord System.description: Chord voicing, variant resolution, and slot management. Uses _chordVariantToMidi() for MIDI conversion. Slots use _seqSlotSetText() (never textContent).

Drum System.description: Drum grid, banks, sound loading. Multiple drum banks with switchable kits. Tape Stack UI redesign (Direction 3).

Metronome.description: Unified global metronome engine. Click sound generation, BPM-synced scheduling.

Song Manager.description: Song CRUD, project/folder organization, Kanban/grid list view. Songs flow through idea → drafting → song stages. Firestore songs collection with real-time onSnapshot.

Auth.description: Firebase Auth with Google, email/password, and anonymous sign-in. onAuthStateChanged controls session lifecycle. On auth change: reset songs, currentId, stop all polling.

Collaboration.description: Real-time collaboration via Firestore. Shared songs with sharedWith field, onSnapshot for live sync.

Subscription / Tiers.description: Stripe-based subscription tiers. Tier limits enforced via TIER_LIMITS constant. Firestore users/{uid}.tier field. Real-time tier updates via onSnapshot.

Piano Roll.description: Logic Pro-style piano roll overlay for note editing. Grid-based note entry with snap. Canvas rendering for waveforms and note blocks.

Quick Chords.description: Quick chord palette UI for fast chord entry. Roman numeral display, variant picker.

Timeline / Playback Engine.description: Timeline-based playback engine. Section boundaries, beat scheduling, legacy data migration. Lookahead scheduler at TL_LOOKAHEAD = 0.15s.

Inline Sequencer.description: Inline sequence display within song detail view. Preview and import features.

Undo / Clipboard (UCB).description: Global undo/redo system. Direction-based clipboard with toggle states and node colors.

UI State Persistence.description: Firestore-based UI state save/restore. No localStorage for state. users/{uid}.lastState and songs/{songId}.uiState. Loading screen covers restore.

Tutorial System.description: Floating overlay with live walkthrough for user onboarding.

worklets.context: // Insert noise gate if AudioWorklet is available AND armed track has it enabled

architecture_rules.3: Sequencer boot: DOM must exist before playback. Use _rowSeqBoot(song). Never call seqPlay() directly unless DOM is mounted.
architecture_rules.4: On auth change: Reset songs, currentId. Stop all polling.
architecture_rules.5: Chord slots: Never use textContent. Always use _seqSlotSetText(slot, x)
architecture_rules.6: After take changes: Always call ftSyncAllStrips()
architecture_rules.8: Grid logic: Use song.drumSteps and song.chordSteps. Do NOT rely on raw song.grid
architecture_rules.10: CSS layout: Flex + absolute children require height: 100%

critical_patterns.sequencer_mapping: Drum and chord grids have different resolutions. Scheduler runs at drum resolution. Chords map via: Math.floor(drumStep * chordSteps / drumSteps)
critical_patterns.four_track_recorder: ft- UI layer shares scope with _mt* and _vr*. RAF loop: ftTickStart() → ftTick()
